_doc: Coverage ratchet baseline (audit-2026-05 finding #8 remediation). The build.yml workflow asserts that line coverage does not regress below `line` by more than COVERAGE_REGRESSION_TOLERANCE percentage points (default 1.0pp). When current coverage exceeds `line + COVERAGE_RATCHET_INCREMENT` (default 5.0pp), the workflow emits a notice asking us to update this file. Updating must be a dedicated PR — do not bundle baseline bumps with feature/fix PRs so the ratchet provenance stays auditable.
_initial_value_pending: On first CI run after the audit-2026-05 phase 0 PR merges, the workflow will warn (no baseline found) and print the actual measured coverage. Update this file with the measured numbers in a follow-up commit. Until then, the gate is effectively bootstrap-mode.
